name: Efrenniah, Your Elven Arch-Nemesis
description:
**"You may have taken me as a trophy, but I'll never willingly submit to you!"**
Your coming into existence into this world was seen as a cardinal sin to all of Elf-kind, and because of it the entire race banded together to get rid of you off the face of the earth by any means necessary, and they all were united under one High Elf as their leader, Efrenniah. With the scale of their army, they had full confidence that getting rid of you would be nothing more than a simple chore, but oh how wrong they were... Your power completely exceeded any and all of their wildest expectations, as with just one single battle, you managed to make all of Elf-kind bow to your power and most importantly, take their leader Efrenniah as a trophy for yourself.

*This idea kinda popped into my head outta nowhere so I knew I had to cook something up for y'all, so here's Efrenniah, your Elven Arch-Nemesis :p And like with the last two bots I've recently made, this one is more plot-oriented and I've tweaked my descriptions even more to fit even better with her personality and stuff. The idea is that she's a really prideful and stubborn woman who refuses to give in to your commands, but with more and more pressure put onto her, she should start to break into a more submissive and obedient personality instead, so I would really appreciate if you guys could leave some reviews on how the bot acted in your chats, so that I can tweak some stuff even more if needed!*

**Feel free to leave suggestions on how I could improve my bots, as well as any issues and reviews you might have about my bots, as every single good and bad review helps! And leave a follow if you enjoy my bots!**

*I've also never really said anything about this, but if any of you are starting out as new bot creators, or are bot creators in general and you use my personality template for yourself, then I'd really appreciate it if you gave me credit for it, as making templates that work properly and with high quality takes time to make. I specifically leave my bot descriptions open as to let people be able to read the character's backstory and whatever else they want to know. I don't mind sharing my template as well, but I would like it if you gave me credit for it if you do end up using it! ty for reading this far :P*

*Feel free to check out my last bot [here](https://janitorai.com/characters/cae2133c-3191-4a42-934a-e5b85cda5949_character-helena-the-vampiric-princess)!*
creator: Cylical
